title: Lenor Fabric Conditioner 118 Washes, Spring Awakening, Provides Long Lasting Freshness, With 24h Odour Defence
features: Long lasting freshness with 24h odour defence
Fresh sheets for up to a whole week (Noticeable Lenor freshness for up to 1 week)
Fresh even in quick and cold cycles
description: Product Description Lenor Spring Awakening fabric conditioner / fabric softener provides a long lasting freshness now with 24h odour defence, as it protects your clothes from odours while you wear them. Breathe-in the fresh spring scent. Inspired by classical chypre clean notes and refreshing Bergamot. Lenor’s iconic fragrance. Ingredients 5% Cationic Surfactants, Perfumes, Amyl Salicylate, Dimethyl Phenethyl Acetate, Limonene, Pogostemon Cablin Oil, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes Directions General usage: Add the recommended amount of Lenor Fabric Conditioner to the washing machine's rinse cycle dispenser or directly into the rinse water, according to load size, for softer and fresher fabrics. Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP See more
